creator: hardy.schumacher@amd.com
text:
Add new port games/csp for The Combat Simulator Project, a flight simulator.
Main web site is http://csp.sourceforge.net.

Dependencies:
audio/libogg
audio/libvorbis
audio/openal
audio/osgal (=> PR submitted)
devel/commoncpp
devel/libsigc++20
devel/swig13
graphics/osg
graphics/SLD12
lang/python
